description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic rifle with a wooden stock and forearm, featuring a straight comb and a cutout near the butt for a sling attachment. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with a prominent front sight post and a rear aperture sight. The rifle has a detachable box magazine located just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is relatively slender and of standard length, extending well beyond the wooden forearm. The trigger and trigger guard are metallic, and the overall finish of the wood is matte with visible grain. The metallic components have a smooth, slightly reflective finish, typical of blued or parkerized steel.
description: A classic semi-automatic rifle with a wooden stock, metallic barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features iron sights and a standard-length barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metallic barrel, and the detachable box magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the buttstock, rear sight, and the top of the receiver.
